footer_main.about_desc: A platform specialized in publishing and distributing e-books and strategic research. We are interested in delivering knowledge to every reader easily and safely through a unique and reliable digital experience.

top_banner: Welcome to International Distribution and Publishing _ The house of thought, the cradle of creativity, and a bridge connecting the word with analysis and the book with development.

about.title: International House for Distribution and Publishing
about.motto: "Horizons towards eternity... Knowledge without restrictions... Ideas without limits!"
about.subtitle1: Where ideas turn into books, and books into inspiring journeys for minds and hearts.
about.subtitle2: We author, publish, and distribute – to reach your message to every reader everywhere.
about.subtitle3: ✨ From literary creativity to scientific and strategic studies, we are pioneers in the knowledge industry.
about.subtitle4: 📖 With us, your book is not just pages, but a window that illuminates minds.
about.subtitle5: 🤝 We support authors, elevate ideas, and provide content that enriches society.
about.subtitle6: 🚀 Follow us now and be part of the world of creativity and limitless knowledge.

who_we_are.title: Who We Are
who_we_are.description1: <0>International House for Publishing and Distribution was established in 1987</0> in the state of New Jersey. It is considered one of the first Arab and Islamic publishing houses in the United States of America, with approximately <1>200 books</1> in all fields of publishing, whether Islamic, literary, political, or comparative religion, as well as children's books in Arabic, English, and Spanish.
who_we_are.description2: One of its most famous publications is the <0>Islamic Business Directory</0>, which has been published in the Eastern United States from 1990 until 2025.

structure.title: Parent Organization: International House for Distribution
structure.subtitle: International House for Publishing & Strategic Studies
structure.item1_title: International House for Publishing and Distribution
structure.item1_desc: Publishing books and studies (politics, civilization, philosophy, geopolitics, future studies, literature).
structure.item2_desc: Economic studies, market analysis, project evaluation, investment consulting.
structure.item3_desc: Geopolitics, international system, strategic security, and the future of the world order.

vision.title: Mission and Vision
vision.desc: Producing solid strategic knowledge to become a leading international intellectual platform that connects hearts with minds.

values.title: Intellectual Values
values.desc: Strategic Wisdom | Intellectual Independence | Analytical Depth
values.motto: We combine authenticity and modernity in delivering the voice of wisdom.

school.title: School of Balanced Strategic Realism
school.desc: Our intellectual approach combines geopolitics and analysis of power balances to build a comprehensive vision for the future.

goals.title: Shared Strategic Goals
items: Publishing religious and scientific works that enhance identity.
Empowering young writers and creating new creators.
Expanding the circle of distribution geographically and digitally.
Combining authenticity and modernity in content.
Enriching the strategic thought of the researcher and decision-maker.

footer.quote: "Wisdom in understanding power... and insight in anticipating the future"
footer.rights: © International House for Publishing and Distribution - All rights reserved

aldawlia_distribution.hero_subtitle: International Foundation: We help you transform your idea into a successful realistic project with calculated steps.
aldawlia_distribution.intro_p1: We rely on accurate studies and comprehensive market analysis to ensure informed decisions based on facts and figures.
aldawlia_distribution.intro_p2: Turn your idea into a successful project; we provide you with a comprehensive study that helps you make the right decision at the right time.
aldawlia_distribution.vision_desc: In a fast-changing world like New York and New Jersey, project success is no longer based on enthusiasm alone... but on precise planning, smart analysis, and correct decision-making.

importance.title: Why are feasibility studies important?
importance.desc: Many projects start with a great idea... but they fail due to the lack of a clear vision. A feasibility study is an integrated roadmap that helps you understand:
items: Is your project viable for success?
How much capital do you need?
What is the expected volume of profits?
And what are the potential risks?

offering.title: What do we offer you?
offering.desc: We don't just provide a report... we provide a complete strategic vision that includes:

items.d: Comprehensive analysis of the target market, demand, and customers.
Costs, revenues, profits, and break-even analysis.
A clear plan for human resources, equipment, and workflow.
Identifying potential challenges and developing practical solutions to avoid them.

message.title: ✨ Our Message to You
message.desc: Don't start your project on intuition alone... start it with science, a plan, and a clear vision that guarantees you success in the heart of New York and New Jersey.

cta.title: Ready to turn your idea into a successful project?
cta.desc: Contact us now to discuss your idea and start your feasibility study with our experts in the US market.

hero.title: International Wisdom Institute for Strategic Studies
hero.legal_affiliation: Legal Affiliation: Research and Studies wing of International House for Distribution LLC

core_idea.title: First: The Core Idea of the Institute
core_idea.desc: The institute is based on studying global shifts in politics, strategy, and geopolitics, with a focus on understanding international power balances and formulating intellectual visions that help in reading the future.
core_idea.footer_desc: In order to provide deep insights that help researchers, decision-makers, and communities understand the changing world.

about.title: About the Institute
about.desc: International Wisdom Institute (IWI) is an independent think tank concerned with strategic and geopolitical studies, aimed at understanding major shifts in the international system and analyzing power dynamics and global balances.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: A leading international intellectual platform in strategic studies, contributing to building a deeper understanding of global shifts and formulating balanced future visions.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: Providing high-level strategic studies and analyses on international and geopolitical issues, and promoting a culture of strategic thinking and political wisdom.

values.title: Core Values
values.desc: Intellectual Independence | Scientific Objectivity | Strategic Thinking | Wisdom in Analysis | Openness to Global Dialogue

objectives.title: Strategic Objectives
items: Analyzing shifts in the international system and power balances.
Providing insights to understand international conflicts and alliances.
Supporting intellectual dialogue on the future of international relations.
Producing research and studies that serve decision-makers and researchers.
Building an international network of researchers, thinkers, and experts.

activities.title: Activities
items: Issuing specialized periodic strategic studies and reports.
Organizing international intellectual conferences, seminars, and workshops.
Publishing solid analytical articles and building platforms for intellectual dialogue.
Training and qualifying young researchers in the fields of strategic thinking.

main.s: Studying the impact of geography on policy making.
i: Studying spheres of influence and conflict

main.s: Studying the evolution of the international system and power shifts.
i: Analyzing the rise and fall of powers

others.t: Political economy, economic conflicts, and resources.
Philosophy of power and contemporary strategic thought.

items.d: Monitoring crises, providing position estimates, and studying possible scenarios.
Balances in the Middle East, Asia, Europe, Africa, and the Americas.
Annual geopolitical report, global risk report, and power balances.
Producing maps of spheres of influence, military alliances, energy, and global resources.
Building comprehensive strategic databases and analyzing global trends.

future.title: The Next Phase: Prestige and Institutional Structure

footer.rights1: Research and Studies wing of International House for Distribution LLC © 2026
footer.rights2: All rights reserved to International Wisdom Institute

hero.title: Islamic Business <0>Directory</0>
hero.subtitle: Your guide to reliable businesses from your community
hero.description: Discover the best services and professions from Arabs and Muslims in your area. We have been connecting business owners with their target audience since 1990.
points: The directory covers all areas of the Eastern United States and is distributed free of charge to Islamic centers and institutions.
We are the trusted bridge connecting the Arab community with the best professional and commercial service providers.

about.title: About Islamic Business Directory
about.desc_italic: The directory is issued under the auspices of both the Islamic Center in Bay Ridge, Brooklyn, New York, and the International House for Publishing and Distribution in New Jersey.
items: The Muslim Business Directory covers the east of the United States
The directory is distributed free of charge to Arab and Islamic shops, Islamic centers and institutions act.
The Muslim BUSINESS DIRECTORY is issued of each year.
The first issue of The Muslim BUSINESS DIRECTORY was in 1990.
arabic_points: - The directory is issued under the auspices of both the Islamic Center in Bay Ridge, Brooklyn, New York, and the International House for Publishing and Distribution in New Jersey.
- The Islamic Business Directory covers the Eastern United States.
- The directory is distributed free of charge to Arab and Islamic shops and to Islamic centers and institutions.
- The directory is issued every year.
- The first issue of the directory was in 1990 and continues to be issued until now, 2026.
